name: shared-calendar
description: Real-time shared calendar & collaboration tool for small teams.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix electron
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run start --prefix electron"
